Zh: 无视他。

En: It's a harmless quirk. Can't you just roll with it?
Zh: “随便聊聊而已。你就不能睁只眼闭只眼吗？”

En: OBSERVE, he turns to the women. "LIKE A PEASANT HOPING TO BED A NOBLEWOMAN, THE HAM SANDWICH IS REACHING STRAIGHT FOR THE *ADVANCED* CONCEPTS. NO HUMILITY, AWARENESS, OR RESPECT."
Zh: “你看。”他转向女人。“如同一个想睡贵族女人的农民一样。这个火腿三明治正在扑向*超前*概念。一点没有谦卑、神智或者尊敬。”

En: Get your dirty hick-dick away from these advanced concepts, peasant!
Zh: “把你的臭丁丁从那些超前概念上拿走，农民！”

En: TO COMPREHEND TIME YOU MUST POSSESS AT LEAST A BASIC UNDERSTANDING OF HOW *REALITY* WORKS, WHAT THE RULES ARE. THE LOOK OF INFINITE ASTOUNDMENT IN YOUR EYES SAYS YOU HAVE *NO IDEA*.
Zh: “为了理解时间，你至少得对*现实*的运作法则有最基本的理解。你眼中无穷无尽的震惊告诉我，你对此*一无所知*。”

En: I admit I've re-entered this reality quite recently. Things are still hazy.
Zh: “我承认我最近才回到现实中来。我依然头昏脑胀。”

En: You're right -- I don't even know *who I am*... (Look at your hands in bewilderment.)
Zh: “你是对的——我甚至不知道*我是谁*……”（困惑地看向手掌。）

En: Hey, I'm a police officer, I know *plenty*!
Zh: “嘿，我是个警官，我知道*很多*！”

En: THE CONCEPTS YOU REACH FOR ARE FAR BEYOND YOU, PUPA. WITHOUT THE NECESSARY VOCABULARY YOU ARE ONLY WASTING MY TIME. He frowns. "EDUCATE YOURSELF FIRST, TALK TO PEOPLE, AND UNDERSTAND THE BASICS."
Zh: “你想理解的概念远超你的能力范围，蚕蛹。连基本词汇都不知道，你只是在浪费我的时间。”他皱眉。“你得先学习。和别人聊聊，问清楚现实的基础概念。”

En: This again? Guess we need to return to Mr. Monolith once we've gotten a better understanding of the whole 'reality thing'.
Zh: 又来？看来我们得在搞明白这个‘现实’东西之后才能回来和石柱先生聊天了。

En: He's got a point. You're never going to turn back time if you don't understand how the pieces move. Let's find someone *rich* (that's how you know they've got the basics down) and pick their brain.
Zh: 他说得有道理。如果你不知道现实的运作规律，你绝不可能逆转时间。我们去问一个*富裕*的人（你知道他们肯定清楚基础问题），啃啃他们的脑子。

En: Just remember, minimum effort -- let things get too brainy and *BANG*! You're a binoclard. No one wants that.
Zh: 但记住，别花太多努力——要是搞得太复杂，你就*梆*！变成了一个四眼仔。你可不想那样。

En: But I learned how the reality works!
Zh: “但我已经知道现实的运作了！”

En: What is your problem?!
Zh: “你有什么问题？！”

En: Clearly that wasn't enough. You have to do something *drastic* to get under his skin and open him up.
Zh: 这显然不够。你得做些*耸人听闻*的事情才能打开他的心防。

En: The statueesque giant seems to have already forgotten your presence. He's deep in thought, eyes scanning the horizon...
Zh: 雕塑般的巨人看起来已经忘记了你的存在。他沉浸在思绪中，视线扫过地平线……

En: Knock him... THE *FUCK* OUT!
Zh: 把他……踢个*稀巴烂*！

En: Find common ground with him, ease yourself in there.
Zh: 找到共同语言，让他放松下来。

En: You need to get under his skin first... get him to open up somehow.
Zh: 你得先潜移默化……让他对你坦诚一些。

En: MANAGED TO LEARN THE REALITY RHIZOME -- AND NEXT UP IS RETURNING TO THE PAST? The giant locks eyes with you. His face is serious...
Zh: “你了解了现实的根茎——然后就想回到过去？”巨人凝视你。他的表情十分严肃……

En: THAT SURPRISES NO ONE. AND YET YOU *STILL* FEEL ENTITLED TO RETURN TO THE PAST? The giant locks eyes with you. His face is serious...
Zh: “这毫不出奇。而你*仍然*觉得自己春子资格回到过去？”巨人盯着你。他的表情十分严肃……

En: COME BACK TO ME WHEN YOU'VE MASTERED THE RHIZOME. He crosses his arms, towering above you with a menacing shadow.
Zh: “等你学会了现实的根茎再来问我。”他抱起胳膊，像一座铁塔那样俯瞰你。

En: A studious approach... Seems like a good direction. Turn it into *science*!
Zh: 一个勤勉的方式……看起来是个不错的方向。把它变得*科学*起来！

En: He surveys the traffic jam, then turns his eyes back to you. Waiting, prepared...
Zh: 他研究着塞車的状况，然后转回到你面前。万事俱备地等待着……

En: YOU DON'T HAVE IT IN YOU. BE GRATEFUL FOR THAT.
Zh: “你身上没有它。你应该为此感激。”

En: IT SADDENS EVEN ME. THE GHOUL IS A CRUEL MASTER.
Zh: “它甚至令我伤心。酒精是个残酷的主人。”

En: Othen than race science, what else do you think he's into?
Zh: 除了种族科学，你觉得他还对什么感兴趣？

En: Light bondage?
Zh: 轻度捆绑？

En: Tattoos?
Zh: 纹身？

En: Perhaps *socialism*, seeing that he's working for the Union...
Zh: 或许*工人主义*，他似乎在为工会干活……

En: Wirral. A guy so engrossed with various races *has to* play pen-and-paper role-playing games.
Zh: 威勒尔。一个沉迷于种族科学的家伙，*必须得*玩一玩纸笔角色扮演游戏。

En: Welkins?
Zh: 精灵？

En: Body art?
Zh: 人体彩绘？

En: Sadomasochism?
Zh: 虐恋？

En: No idea. The only thing he seems to care about are his *wömen*.
Zh: 不知道。他好像只在乎他的*女人*。

En: Bingo! This specimen has surrounded himself not only with one or two, but *three* stellar babes.
Zh: 对了！这个样本出现在了围绕在他身边美丽的宝贝们，甚至不是一个或者两个，而是*三个*。

En: Socialism?
Zh: 工人主义？

En: What's more, all these girls seem to be Kojkos. What's up with that? You have to find out what's his deal with Graad...
Zh: 而且，这些女孩似乎都是克吉克。这是怎么回事？你得搞明白他和格拉德的关系……

En: Yes, but even more importantly -- women. This specimen has surrounded himself not only with one or two, but *three* stellar babes.
Zh: 是，但更重要的是——女人。这个样本出现在了围绕在他身边的卫星般的宝贝们，甚至不是一个或者两个，而是*三个*。

En: Probably not. Women however... He's surrounded himself not with one or two, but *three* stellar babes.
Zh: 或许不。但是女人……他身边围绕着卫星般的宝贝们，甚至不是一个或者两个，而是*三个*。

En: Doubtful. Women however... He's surrounded himself not only with one or two, but *three* stellar babes.
Zh: 看着不像。但是女人……他身边围绕着卫星般的宝贝们，甚至不是一个或者两个，而是*三个*。

En: Could be, but even more importantly -- women. This specimen has surrounded himself not only with one or two, but *three* stellar babes.
Zh: 或许，但更重要的是——女人。这个样本出现在了围绕在他身边的卫星般的宝贝们，甚至不是一个或者两个，而是*三个*。

En: Listen... there's something *personal* I'd like to discuss with you.
Zh: “听着……我想和你讨论一些*私人*问题。”

En: PERSONAL? He seems bemused.
Zh: “私人？”他看起来有些困惑。

En: It's time to address the Men of Wö.
Zh: “是时候说到男人的对立面了。”

En: It's about... (Slowly run your eyes over the girls.) "...*stuff*."
Zh: “那是……”（慢慢扫视女孩们。）“……某些*东西*。”

En: Your babes are very beautiful. I'm sad.
Zh: “你的宝贝们美极了。我真伤心。”

En: It's about the peculiar nature of your friends here.
Zh: “那和你的朋友们的奇特性质有关。”

En: Is he talking about *us*, Jean?
Zh: “他在说*我们*吗，让？”

En: Is he gonna fucking cry, Jean? She wrinkles her nose as if smelling something foul.
Zh: “他是要他妈的哭出来了吗，让？”她皱了皱鼻子，好像闻到什么臭味一样。

En: What is he talking about, Jean?
Zh: “他在说什么，让？”

En: Pervo! You're gonna let him eye-fuck me like that, Jean? She wrinkles her nose as if smelling something foul.
Zh: “变态！你就这样看着他视奸我吗，让？”她皱了皱鼻子，好像闻到什么臭味一样。

En: YOU MEAN THE BABES. I SEE. He appears to be calculating something.
Zh: “你是说宝贝们，我明白了。”他好像在计算什么。

En: PERHAPS WE *SHOULD* TALK IN PRIVATE. COME WITH ME.
Zh: “也许我们*应该*私下交谈。和我走。”

En: YES. I SEE. The answer comes without hesitation. It is unclear to whom it's meant though.
Zh: “是的。我明白了。”他有些犹豫地答道。不知道在对谁说。

En: Wait, where is he taking you?!
Zh: 等等，他要带你去哪里？

En: What about the lieutenant?
Zh: 那警督怎么办？

En: Where are you taking me?
Zh: “你要带我去哪里？”

En: What about the lieutenant? (Turn to Kim.)
Zh: “那警督怎么办？”（转向金。）

En: How long is it going to take?
Zh: “要花多久？”

En: Alright, I'll let you know when I'm ready to go. (Conclude.)
Zh: “好吧，等我准备好了我会告诉你。”（总结。）

En: What about the *case*?! You don't have time for this, at least not *right now*... maybe later...
Zh: 那*案子*怎么办？！你没时间做这种事，尤其是*现在*……或许之后可以……

En: TO THE DEEPEST CAVERNS BENEATH LA ROYAUME, WHERE EYELESS CREATURES, IGNORANT OF LIGHT AND WARMTH, LURK AND SLITHER.
Zh: “我们去王国地下最深的洞穴，那里生活着无眼生物，它们对光线和温暖蒙昧无知，只一味在地下潜伏盘踞。”

En: Don't worry, it's not a trap. *Everyone* can see you go in there together. You'll be fine.
Zh: 别担心，他没在给你设陷阱。*所有人*都看到你们一起去那里了。你不会有事的。

En: Yes, but no one can see what happens *inside*...
Zh: 是的，但没人能看到那*里面*会发生什么……

En: DON'T PANIC, HAM SANDWICH. THAT WAS A JOKE. WE'RE GOING TO MY MOTHER'S OFFICE.
Zh: “别恐慌，火腿三明治。我开个玩笑。我们要去我母亲的办公室。”

En: A MEDIAN AMOUNT OF TIME.
Zh: “不会太久。”

En: You go ahead and have your talk, he replies, glancing over the railing. "I need a few things from Frittte anyways. We'll catch up later."
Zh: “你自己去谈话。”他答道，扫视着扶手。“反正我也需要去弗利多买点东西。我们一会见面。”

En: Women, racism, turning back time -- it couldn't interest him less.
Zh: 女人，种族主义，逆转时间——对他来说不能更无聊了。

En: But what if I don't want to do it without you...
Zh: “但如果我不想一个人去怎么办……。”

En: Okay, sure. I can handle it. No biggie.
Zh: “好吧，当然。我自已一个人能行。没问题。”

En: No really, he assures you, "we're not joined by the hip. You want to talk about women with him and I want to... do pretty much anything else. Don't let me hold you back."
Zh: “不会的。”他安慰你。“我们又不是连体婴儿。你想去和他谈论女人，我想……干点别的。别因为我的缘故而克制自己。”

En: WE CAN TALK WITHOUT THE PAEDOMORPH. IT'S ME AND YOU THIS TIME.
Zh: “我们可以撇开那个低幼态的朋友。这次只有我们两个。”

En: The lieutenant nods, then puts away his notebook. He's ready to go.
Zh: 警督点头，收起笔记本。他准备走了。

En: I AM NOT GOING ANYWHERE -- AND NEITHER IS MY MOTHER'S OFFICE.
Zh: “我哪里也不去——我母亲的办公室也一样。”

En: It's a trap!! No one knows what he might *do to you* once you're in there...
Zh: 这是个陷阱！谁知道你去了那里之后他会*对你*做什么……

En: What about the lieutenant? He's not here, but you might want him to join...
Zh: 那警督呢？他不在，但你希望他和你一起去……

En: Can Lieutenant Kitsuragi join us?
Zh: “曷城警督能和我们一起去吗？”

En: THE PAEDOMORPH? THE PAEDOMORPH IS NOT HERE.
Zh: “那个低幼态的生物？他不在这里。”

En: WE DON'T NEED YOUR FRIEND. IT'S ME AND YOU THIS TIME.
Zh: “我们不需要你那个朋友。这次只有我们两个。”

En: It's okay. Women, racism, turning back time -- the lieutenant wouldn't be interested anyway.
Zh: 没关系。女人种族主义，逆转时间——警督本来也不会感兴趣的。

En: I haven't seen him either, Jean...
Zh: “我也没看到他，让……”

En: IN FACT VISUAL EXPRESSION OF INDIVIDUALITY IS SOMETHING WE ALWAYS PERCEIVED DIFFERENTLY. IT'S A GENERATIONAL CHASM.
Zh: “实际上，个体的视觉表现总是向我们传达不同的信息。这是一个代际的割裂。”

En: Wait, is this a *joke*?!
Zh: 等等，这是个*玩笑*？

En: Alright, let's do this -- before anyone changes their mind!
Zh: 好吧，在我们改变主意之前——动身吧！

En: SPOKEN LIKE A MAN DEFEATED BY LOVE. UNABLE TO FACE THE HARSH REALITIES OF NATURE. WE ARE SKY, BUTTERFLIES, RHODODENDRONS, RHINOS. NATURE AGAINST NATURE. LOVE TAKES COURAGE. COURAGE TO FIGHT.
Zh: “听起来像是一个被爱打败了的男人。无法面对自然的残酷现实。我们是天空，蝴蝶，杜鹃花，犀牛，自然对抗自然。爱需要勇气。战斗的勇气。”

En: YOUR AGREEMENT MEANS NOTHING TO ME. YOU'RE A MAN *DEFEATED* BY LOVE. IT IS PLAIN TO SEE. IT IS IN YOUR FACE, IN YOUR VOICE, IN YOUR HEART. LOVE TAKES COURAGE -- YOU DID NOT HAVE ENOUGH.
Zh: “你的赞同对我来说一文不值。你是个被爱*打败*的男人。这一目了然。我在你的表情、声音和心里看到这点。爱需要勇气——你的勇气还不够。”

En: THIS DEFEATIST TALK OF COOPERATION IS WHY YOU HAVE NO FUTURE. IT IS ALSO WHY YOU HAVE NO LOVE.
Zh: “这种丧气的协作空话就是你找不到未来的原因。这也是你没有爱的原因。”

En: YOU HAD A LITTLE. TOO LITTLE. THAT IS WHY WE ARE IN MY MOTHER'S OFFICE. YOU HAVE COME TO ME, SEEKING WISDOM IN THE SEXUAL ARTS. DO NOT WASTE THIS OPPORTUNITY ON SYCOPHANTIC PERSONALITY MIRRORING.
Zh: “你只有一点。太少了。这就是我们来我母亲办公室的原因。你得来找我，从性的艺术中攫取智慧。别把这个机会浪费在谄媚的人格映像上。”

En: IT WILL SERVE YOU POORLY IN THE GREAT WAR OF LOVE.
Zh: “这在爱的伟大战争中会对你不利。”

En: You seem to have a set idea of masculinity. I wonder where it comes from?
Zh: “你似乎对男子气概怀有某种既定的认知。我想知道它是从何而来的。”

En: THIS IS NO TIME FOR VAGUE GENERALITIES. THERE IS SOMETHING ELSE ON YOUR MIND. ASK THE QUESTION YOU INTENDED TO ASK OR FACE YOUR COWARDICE.
Zh: “别说这些模糊的概念。你在想一些别的事情。你要么问出来，要么承认自己是个懦夫。”

En: Alright. What made you *you*, Measurehead?
Zh: “好吧。是什么让你成为了*你*，测颅先生？”

En: It's not cowardice, it's called having a survival instinct.
Zh: “我不是懦夫，我只是很有求生欲望。”

En: Doesn't look like he has a nervous breakdown every two seconds.
Zh: 他看着不像是会每过两秒精神崩溃一次的那种人。

En: He's going to live to be five hundred years old.
Zh: 他能活到五百岁。

En:
Thank god, Jean, you're back!	“感谢老天，让，你回来了！”
0x010000580001F0DC	Dialogue Text	MEASUREHEAD / FASCHA DQ	You	(Nod first.) Women."
Zh: （先点点头。）“女人。”

En: The room feels soporific in its silence, dust particles twirling around in the air...
Zh: 沉默的房间显得昏昏欲睡，灰尘的颗粒在空气中翻涌……

En: WOMEN, he repeats.
Zh: “女人。”他重复。

En: It's about love.
Zh: “重点是爱。”

En: Culture-victory. The kipts and the Kojkos are showing...
Zh: “文化的胜利。你看那些吉皮特和克吉克人……”

En: It's about her. (Nod solemnly.) "Revachol."
Zh: “重点是她。”（肃穆地点头。）“瑞瓦肖。”

En: I *really* need to find a way to turn back time.
Zh: “我*真的*需要想办法逆转时间。”

En: THAT IS A LIE YOU ADMINISTER YOURSELF. LIKE HEART MEDICINE. GO WITHOUT IT ONE DAY AND YOUR HEART WILL STOP.
Zh: “这只是你灌输给自己的谎言。和心脏药物一样。只要你一天不骗自己，你的心脏就会停跳。”

En: RENOUNCING THE GHOUL IS ALREADY CLEARING THE FOG FROM YOUR MIND. DON'T THINK I DIDN'T NOTICE. MEN ONLY WANT TO REVERSE TIME FOR ONE REASON -- LOVE.
Zh: “弃绝酒精是从你的思维中扫除迷雾的第一步。别以为我没发现。男人只会出于一个目的逆转时间——爱。”

En: I CAN BARELY HEAR YOUR WORDS THROUGH THE VOICE OF AL-GUL, BUT IT SPEAKS TRUTH. MEN ONLY WANT TO REVERSE TIME FOR ONE REASON -- LOVE.
Zh: “你的话被阿尔古盖得几乎听不清了，但你说得对。男人只会出于一个目的逆转时间——爱。”

En: MEN ONLY WANT TO REVERSE TIME FOR ONE REASON. THEY *SAY* IT'S ABOUT HONOUR, JUSTICE, REVENGE, REGRET, REDEMPTION, AND A PLETHORA OF FALSE REASONS, BUT FURTHER BACK -- DEEPER IN -- IT IS ALWAYS LOVE THAT DRIVES THEM.
Zh: “男人只会出于一个目的逆转时间。他们说那是荣耀，正义，复仇，悔恨，赎罪，还有很多其他的假话，但剥掉这些伪装——在他们内心深处——永远是爱在驱动他们。”

En: THEY *SAY* IT'S ABOUT HONOUR, JUSTICE, REVENGE, REGRET, REDEMPTION, AND A PLETHORA OF FALSE REASONS, BUT FURTHER BACK -- DEEPER IN -- IT IS ALWAYS LOVE THAT DRIVES THEM.
Zh: “他们说那是荣耀，正义，复仇，悔恨，赎罪，还有很多其他的假话，但剥掉这些伪装——在他们内心深处——永远是爱在驱动他们。”

En: WE ALREADY ESTABLISHED THAT. TELL ME, WHAT DRIVES YOU TO SEARCH FOR SUCH *FANTASTIC* MEASURES?
Zh: “我们已经建立起这样的概念了。告诉我，是什么驱动着你搜寻这样*奇妙*的事物？”

En: (Shrug.) "No reason, I just want to turn back time."
Zh: （耸肩。）“没什么原因，我只是想逆转时间。”

En: There *is* a competitive element to sex, I agree.
Zh: “我同意，性确实具有一定的竞争性。”

En: Sex is about *cooperation*. It doesn't matter how many partners you've had.
Zh: “性的重点是*协作*。你有多少伴侣并不重要。”

En: Ouch...
Zh: 哎哟……

En: He has a point. While an idea is born potentially immortal, flesh is always doomed to die.
Zh: 他说得有道理。思维或许可以永存，但肉体总有腐朽的一天。

En: Spirit is housed in flesh. No one cares about your fancy 'ideas' if you're getting beaten up behind a bar.
Zh: 精神栖息于肉体之中。如果你在酒吧后巷被狂扁，谁会想听你那些漂亮的‘思维’？

En: That's not true. You have the love of your mother... or do you?
Zh: 不是这样的。你拥有母亲的爱……对吧？

En: Maybe even the love of your friends and colleagues?
Zh: 或许还有你的朋友和同事的爱？

En: Who needs love if you can wield *fear*.
Zh: 如果你能运用*恐惧*，还要爱干什么。

En: You've definitely lost the love of your colleagues.
Zh: 你绝对失去了同事的爱。

En: THE ONLY MAN WORTH BEING CALLED A MAN -- FATHER JAIRZINHO.
Zh: “唯一配被称作男人的人——雅伊济尼奥父亲。”

En: Father Jairzinho? Sounds like some kind of mystic. Or a magician.
Zh: 雅伊济尼奥父亲？听起来像一个神秘学家。或者魔术师。

En: No, this is a *trap*... He will say or do something *horrible* if you go down this path...
Zh: 不，这是个*陷阱*……如果你顺着他的逻辑走，他会对你说或者做一些*糟糕*的事情……

En: The hair on you arm stands up as you hear wind howl behind the window... An outline of a small bathroom appears in your mind's eye. Above the sink -- in a tumbler -- is a pair of labelled toothbrushes...
Zh: 你听到窗外寒风呼啸，感到自己手臂上的汗毛立了起来……你似乎在心里看到一个小卫生间的剪影。在水池的上方——一个管道里面——是一对带标签的牙刷……

En: Nothing in the history of things that *are* has ever *been* as monolithic as Jean-Luc Measurehead right now. He is an obelisk. A towering phallic obelisk of willpower.

En: His tone is so solemn that if your eyes were closed, you could swear he has taken a knee.
Zh: 他的语调忽然变得十分肃穆，要是你闭上了眼睛，你甚至可以发誓他一定正在单膝下跪起誓。

En: I AM NOT SURPRISED. YOU ARE LIKE THE RUNT OF THE LITTER, ABANDONED. INCAPABLE OF NURTURING A WOMAN'S LOVE. OUR MOTHERS ARE THE ONES WHO TEACH US TO RECEIVE AFFECTION FROM THE OPPOSITE SEX -- A BOND YOU HAVE CLEARLY NOT EXPERIENCED.
Zh: “我毫不意外。你像一个在垃圾堆里生活的，被抛弃的小畜生。无法滋养一个女人的爱。我们的母亲教会了我们从异性那里识别爱意——这是一种你显然没有体验过的纽带。”

En: INSTEAD YOU HAVE DEVELOPED THIS UNHEALTHY OBSESSION WITH BABES. ANY BABES, MINE INCLUDED. THIS IS NOT THE ANSWER.
Zh: “与之相反的是，你产生了这种对于宝贝们的病态执念。任何宝贝，包括我的。这不是问题的解决方案。”

En: IT'S NOT TOO LATE YET TO CHANGE THE COURSE. GIVE UP ON AL GUL. THEN GO EVEN FURTHER. REINVENT YOURSELF FROM DEFEAT.
Zh: “现在改变你自己还不晚。放弃对阿尔古的信仰。然后更加深入。从失败中站起来。”

En: IT'S NOT TOO LATE YET TO CHANGE THE COURSE. YOU HAVE ALREADY GIVEN UP ON AL GUL. NOW GO FURTHER. REINVENT YOURSELF FROM DEFEAT.
Zh: “现在改变你自己还不晚。你已经放弃了对阿尔古的信仰。现在更加深入。从失败中站起来。”

En: Something moves in the depths of your mind, sending shocks of cold through the connective tissue. You're sitting on a kicksled, whizzing through the snow. A warm, kind presence is guiding the sled behind you, her mittened hand resting on your back. You feel very, very loved -- and very, very safe.
Zh: 你的意识深处有什么东西动了一下，让你浑身的结缔组织打了个冷颤。你好像坐在一部儿童雪橇上，在皑皑白雪中呼啸而过。一个温暖、和蔼的人正在你身后引导雪橇的方向，她戴着长手套的双手安抚着你的脊背。你感到被很多、很多的爱包裹着——并且非常、非常安全。

En: There should be something here -- a memory, a feeling, even if it's just a glimpse -- but the depths of your psyche remain silent. You don't have a single memory of your mother.
Zh: 应该有些东西——一段记忆，一种感受，即使只是惊鸿一瞥——但你的精神深渊沉默着。你对你的母亲的印象一片空白。

En: I can barely remember my mother.
Zh: “我几乎不记得我的母亲了。”

En: NO. IT'S A BIOLOGICAL CONDITION WHERE A MALE SPECIMEN IS BORN WITHOUT HIS TESTICLES. HAPPENS ALL OVER THE WORLD. AND NOW IT HAS HAPPENED HERE, IN MY MOTHER'S OFFICE, UNDER MY WATCHFUL EYE.
Zh: “不。那是一种生物学上的状况，一个男性的样本从出生时就没有睾丸。全世界各地都有案例。现在它也出现在了这里，在我母亲的办公室里，在我的审视之下。”

En: SHAME. IT WOULD HAVE BEEN AN INTERESTING TOPIC.
Zh: “多么可惜。那本来会是一个有趣的话题。”

En: Promiscuity -- you mean the *cock carousel*. (Twirl your hand around in the air.)
Zh: “乱交——你指*鸡鸡轮盘*。”（在空气中转动你的手掌。）

En: I don't think anyone's being promiscuous with me. I wish they were, though.
Zh: “我不觉得有人在和我乱交。虽然我希望有这样的人。”

En: The goal of any sane relationship is loyalty, marriage, eternal love. Anything else is just vapid pleasure-seeking.
Zh: “任何理智的关系都致力于达成忠诚、婚姻、永恒的爱。任何其他东西都只是索然无味的享乐。”

En: I don't actually care about any of that, I'm just here for *Revachol*.
Zh: “我不关心那种东西，我只是为了*瑞瓦肖*来到这里。”

En: YOU USE VULGAR HUMOUR TO DISTRACT YOURSELF FROM THE PAIN THAT WOMEN HAVE CAUSED YOU. IMPOTENT RAGE AT THEIR PROMISCUITY WILL NOT HEAL YOU. AND IT *REPELS* WOMEN.
Zh: “你用粗鄙的娱乐来分散注意力，让自己不再意识到女人对你造成的创痛。对她们的乱交行为的无能狂怒无法治愈你。而且它只会让女人们更加*厌恶*你。”

En: Who cares about sexual partners and their promiscuity when you've got *the fate and honour of Revachol* on your shoulders?
Zh: 你现在肩负着*瑞瓦肖的命运与荣耀*，谁还在乎性伴侣和她们的乱交行为？

En: But promisssscuity leads to dddrama!
Zh: 但是乱乱乱交会带来戏戏戏剧性！

En: DESPERATION. WISHFUL THINKING. CONFUSION. NO WOMAN WANTS TO CREATE A LASTING PSYCHOSEXUAL BOND WITH A MAN IN THRALL TO HIS BIOLOGICAL IMPULSES.
Zh: “绝望。祈求。迷惑。没有女人想和一个屈从于生理冲动的男人建立长久的心理-性纽带。”

En: IT DOES NOT SURPRISE ME THAT THE COMPLEXITIES OF THE PSYCHOSEXUAL BOND BETWEEN A MAN AND A WOMAN REMAIN BEYOND YOUR REACH. INSTEAD YOU CONTINUE TO IDEALISE THE FLAWED AND HALLUCINATORY RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN YOUR PARENTS, HOPING TO CORRECT THEIR MISTAKES.
Zh: “不出我的意料，一男一女之间心理-性纽带这么复杂的事情，对你来说是遥不可及的。与之相反的是，你继续美化你父母之间有缺陷的虚幻关系，期望以此弥补他们的过错。”

En: CONTINUOUS DENIAL. YOUR LACK OF PSYCHOSEXUAL SELF-AWARENESS DOES NOT SURPRISE ME. SOMETHING TRAGIC MUST HAVE HAPPENED TO YOU IN THE PAST FOR YOU TO DENY IT SO VIGOROUSLY.
Zh: “继续否认。不出我的意料，你对心理-性关系缺乏自知之明。你的否认如此激烈，想必你一定遭受过创伤。”

En: YOU HAVE TO SHED THIS INFANTILE SHELL IF YOU *EVER* WISH TO FIND A WORTHY MATE.
Zh: “哪怕你只是*有一点*想要找到一个相衬的伴侣，你都必须打碎这层幼稚的外壳。”

En: You *really* have to find out at some point what's up with him and the Kojkas...
Zh: 你*真的*得搞明白他和那些克吉克是怎么回事……

En: Sounds *fun* -- it's high time you incorporated some of these things into your daily life.
Zh: 听起来很*有趣*——是时候把这些东西融入你的日常生活了。

En: Hmm, so maybe *that's* what's up between him and the Kojkas...
Zh: 哼……所以*这就是*他和那些克吉克之间的情况了……

En: Time to get personal -- he's finally ready to open up to you.
Zh: 是时候进入私人对话了——他已经卸下心防。

En: Smells like physical violence... just like with Cuno and his dad.
Zh: 像是肢体暴力的味道……就像坤诺和他的爸爸。

En: Maybe your father just didn't know how to express his love?
Zh: “也许你的父亲只是不知道如何表达关爱？”

En: Smells like physical violence...
Zh: 像是肢体暴力的味道……

En: YOU ARE NOT FIT TO MAKE ASSUMPTIONS ABOUT FATHER JAIRZINHO. HIS ABILITY TO FORM EMOTIONAL BONDS WITH HIS OFFSPRING WAS *EXEMPLARY*.
Zh: “你没有资格对雅伊济尼奥父亲说三道四。他同后代建立感情纽带的能力*独树一帜*。”

En: TEACHING SELF-CONTROL, DISCIPLINE, ASCESIS, AND RESPECT WAS AN ACT OF LOVE GREATER THAN ANYTHING THAT YOU OR YOUR PHARMACO-THERAPEUTIC CULTURE CAN COME UP WITH.
Zh: “他让我明白，自控、戒律、禁欲和尊敬是一种爱的表现。这比你或者你的药理-疗程文化所能产生的任何形式的爱都要高贵得多。”

En: Hit him right in the soft spot there with that question.
Zh: 用那个问题痛击他的软肋。

En: I'm sure your dad thinks you're an apex predator. A top dog.
Zh: “我确信你的爸爸认为你是一个顶级掠食者。一个领袖人物。”

En: You don't always have to be so *hard*. Live a little, let loose.
Zh: “你不用总是这么*强硬*。偶尔也可以放松一点，享受生活。”

En: Stop making everything about *me*.
Zh: “别再把任何事都说得和*我*有关一样了”

En: Yes, khm... so, back to babes and turning back time...
Zh: “是的，咳咳……回到宝贝和逆转时间的话题……”

En: YES, YOUR FAVOURITE TOPICS. WHAT ABOUT THEM?
Zh: “不错，你最爱的话题。她们怎么了？”

En: I AM JUST STATING THE FACTS. YOUR TRAUMATIZED ESSENCE IS IN PLAIN SIGHT.
Zh: “我只是在陈述事实。你饱经创伤的精华对我来说一目了然。”

En: Intellectual independence -- definitely something worth celebrating.
Zh: 智力独立——绝对是值得庆祝的事情。

En: Even if he tries anything, you can just *slip out of his reach* like an eel...
Zh: 不管他想做什么，你都可以像一条鳗鱼那样*滑出他的掌控*……

En: Even if it's a trap, you can just *slip out of his reach* like an eel...
Zh: 即使这是个陷阱，你也可以像一条鳗鱼那样*滑出他的掌控*……

En: He's right -- everything's a contest and only the *shiftiest* competitors win.
Zh: 他是对的——一切都是比赛，只有最*足智多谋*的竞争者才能赢。

En: An honest job for an honest man.
Zh: 一个诚实的男人，做着一份诚实的工作。

En: Hopefully he at least taught his son some welding...
Zh: 希望他能教给儿子一些焊接技巧……

En: He's making it up to gain an *unfair advantage* over you in sexual -- and possibly financial -- competition. Slip out of his reach!
Zh: 他在捏造事实，就为了在和你的性——也可能是财务——竞争中*胜之不武*。滑出他的掌控！

En: Did he teach you some welding at least?
Zh: “那他至少教了你一些焊接技巧？”

En: NO. I AM NOT INTERESTED IN WELDING.
Zh: “没有。我对焊接不感兴趣。”

En: That's not why I've come here. I *really* need to turn back time now. (Continue.)
Zh: “我不是来这里聊这个的。我*真的*需要逆转时间。”（继续。）

En: CLEARLY IT IS IMPOSSIBLE FOR YOU TO SHED YOUR NEUROTIC OBSESSION. THIS WAILING FOR THE PAST IS A TASK UNFIT FOR MEN. IT IS BETTER LEFT FOR WIDOWS, MOURNING THEIR HUSBANDS -- AND FOR MENTALLY ILL COMMUNISTS MOURNING THEIR COMMUNE.
Zh: “很显然，你无法打碎你的神经质的执念。哀悼过去不是男人该做的事情。这应该让那些为亡夫恸哭寡妇来做——还有那些精神有问题的康米主义者，终日悲叹于他们的公社。”

En: IF YOU WANT ADVICE ON BABES -- OR THE MYSTERIES OF LIFE -- OR EVEN ON REVACHOL -- LOOK FORWARD. TO ESCAPE YOUR DEFEATED STATE YOU NEED TO MOVE FORWARD. ONTO FUTURE VICTORIES.
Zh: “如果你想要关于宝贝们的建议——或者关于生活的奥秘——或者甚至瑞瓦肖——向前看。你需要不断前进来摆脱失败的状态。向未来的胜利进发。”

En: But isn't he a traditionalist?! Why does he keep talking about future...
Zh: 但他不是传统主义者吗？！他为什么一直在讲未来……

En: Wait, I thought you were a traditionalist...
Zh: “等等，我以为你是个传统主义者……”

En: I AM NOT A *TRADITIONAL* TRADITIONALIST. LIFE ON THIS PLANET DOES NOT MOVE BACKWARDS. THE IVY MOVES FORWARD, COVERING THE WHOLE DOOR. THE FLOWERS GROW OUTWARD, COVERING THE WHOLE MEADOW. NOTHING GROWS *AGAINST* TIME AND SPACE. ONLY ALONG ITS LAYLINES CAN NATURE PROGRESS.
Zh: “我不是一个*传统的*传统主义者。这个星球上的生命不会回到过去。藤蔓向上生长，覆盖整扇门扉。花朵向上生长，连成整片原野。从没有哪个生物是*逆着*时间和空间生长的。只有在既定的道路里，自然才能进化。”

En: You don't get it. I need to bring disco back -- from the Thirties.
Zh: “你不明白。我要从30年代——把迪斯科带回来。”

En: Maybe you're right, but I won't know it until I've tried the impossible.
Zh: “也许你是对，但在尝试过不可能的事情之前，我也没法知道结果。”

En: IT SEEMS TO ME YOU ARE IN NEED OF A WARNING. HERE IT IS: IT IS ABSOLUTELY POSSIBLE TO RETURN TO THE PAST. YOU JUST NEED TO TAKE A TICKET TO SEREGLEE ISLAND, THE SOUTHERNMOST OF THE SEMENINE ARCHIPELAGO, ALSO KNOWN AS ILE DU FANTÔME. AND WALK INTO PALE.
Zh: “在我看来，你需要一个警告。这个警告就是：回到过去是绝对有可能的。你只需要取得一张船票，前往塞热格利岛，那是塞美尼群岛的极南之境，亦称幽灵岛。然后走进灰域。”

En: It's about the Suzerain. He's counting on me.
Zh: “这和宗主国有关。他只能靠我了。”

En: I’m still convicned the babes were more *faithful* in the past. They stuck with their men.
Zh: “我还是觉得过去的宝贝们更加*忠诚*。她们不会离开自己的男人。”

En: LET IT DITHER AND ROT YOUR MIND. THEN YOU CAN MARINATE FOREVER IN YOUR IRREVERSABLE DEFEAT. WHILE RACE ENEMIES LAUGH AT YOUR MOTIONLESS, GAP-MOUTHED CORPSE.
Zh: “让它同化、腐蚀你的思维。然后你就可以永永远远地腌在你无可逆转的失败之中。与此同时种族敌人就会耻笑你僵直的、张着嘴的尸体。”

En: Pale? What is pale... it does *not* sound inviting.
Zh: 灰域？灰域是什么……它听起来一点也*不*诱人。

En: You still haven't found out about pale, but it certainly doesn't sound inviting...
Zh: 你还是不知道灰域是什么，但它听起来一点也不诱人……

En: No, no... this does *not* sound inviting!
Zh: 不，不……这听起来一点也*不*诱人！

En: Where would you even get a ticket? You can't just pack your bags and leave.
Zh: 去哪里买票？你不能就这样收拾细软就跑路。

En: Finally -- a chance to connect with the *divine*.
Zh: 终于——有机会搭上*神圣*了。

En: It gets very cold in the office, like in a desert after the nightfall...
Zh: 办公室里变得寒冷起来，如同夜幕降临之后的沙漠……

En: Wait, what's pale?
Zh: “等等，灰域是什么？”

En: Cool, where do I get the tickets?
Zh: “酷啊，我去哪里买票？”

En: Why do I have the feeling there's a catch...
Zh: “为什么我觉得这里有诈……”

En: YOU WANT TO RETURN TO THE PAST AND YOU DON'T EVEN KNOW WHAT YOU'RE FACING. He stops, momentarily speechless.
Zh: “你想回到过去，而你甚至不知道你要面对的是什么。”他停下话头，似乎有些语塞。

En: MAYBE IT'S FOR THE BEST. IT IS TOO LATE TO EXPLAIN THE INTRICACIES OF THE REALITY-RHIZOME IF THE OPPORTUNITY TO LEARN ITS FUNDAMENTAL TERMS HAS PASSED YOU. TREAT THE PALE AS A MYSTERY -- DARK, REPULSIVE, AND SURPRISINGLY MUNDANE -- LIKE CURDLING MILK OR A MOULDING NECTARINE.
Zh: “或许这样最好。如果学习基础词汇的机会已经错过，向你解释现实-根茎的精妙之处，就已经太晚了。将灰域视作一个谜题——黑暗、可憎，又令人惊异地平凡——如同结块的牛奶、发霉的蜜桃。”

En: OR GO AND SEE IT FOR YOURSELF. WATCH IT RISE FROM THE SAND AND THE SKY, TAKING CORAL REEFS IN ITS BOSOM.
Zh: “或者你就自己去看。看它如何从沙漠与天空中生出，吞噬珊瑚礁。”

En: THERE IS NO CATCH. YOU WILL GET WHAT YOU WANT. THE GHOUL IS A CRUEL MASTER, BUT IT IS NOT PALE. PALE TAKES YOUR MIND AND REJECTS THE FLESH. IT IS CAPRICIOUS AND TERRIFYING, LIKE A VIRGIN. YOU WILL LOSE YOUR COURAGE BEFORE HER FACE.
Zh: “没有反转。你会得到你想要的。酒精是个残酷的主人，但它还比不上灰域。灰域夺走你的心智，丢弃你的血肉。它任性、可怖，像一个处女。你会在直面她之前就失去勇气。”

En: GO HAVE A LOOK, he gestures toward the intersection. "THE WHITE-HAIRED PROTEIN MASS AT THE INTERSECTION. A LORRY DRIVER. IMPOSSIBLE TO MISS HER IF YOU'RE EVEN A HALF-DECENT COP."
Zh: “去看看。”他指向十字路口。“路口那白发的蛋白块。一个货車驾驶员。哪怕你只是个半吊子的警察，也一定能找到她。”

En: BEFORE YOU GO LOOKING FOR TICKETS, I SUGGEST YOU SEE WHAT IT DOES TO A MAN. THE GHOUL IS A CRUEL MASTER, BUT IT IS NOT PALE. PALE TAKES YOUR MIND AND REJECTS THE FLESH. IT IS CAPRICIOUS AND TERRIFYING, LIKE A VIRGIN. YOU WILL LOSE YOUR COURAGE BEFORE HER FACE.
Zh: “在你买票之前，我建议你先看看灰域能对一个人造成什么后果。酒精是个残酷的主人，但它还比不上灰域。灰域夺走你的心智，丢弃你的血肉。它任性、可怖，像一个处女。你会在她面前失去勇气的。”

En: A protein mass?
Zh: “蛋白块？”

En: Alright, I'll go check her out then. [Leave.]
Zh: “好吧，那我去问问她。”[离开。]

En: Paledriver? Yes, I've already talked to her.
Zh: “灰域驾驶员？我已经和她聊过了。”

En: Paledriver? I tried talking to her, but didn't get very far.
Zh: “灰域驾驶员？我试图和她聊聊，但是进展不佳。”

En: AN EMPTY VESSEL THE MIND HAS DESERTED. A HUSK, NO LONGER INHABITED BY A CONSCIOUSNESS. BIOLOGICAL WASTE.
Zh: “一个被思维遗弃的空荡荡的容器。一具不再被意识占据的躯壳。生物废料。”

En: A chill races down your spine.
Zh: 你的背上感受到一阵寒意。

En: This goes far beyond your conceptual reach... beyond the conceptual reach of *anyone*, really.
Zh: 这超出了你的理论极限……可以说是*任何人*的理论极限。

En: YES. OUR LITTLE MEETING HAS FINISHED. IT'S TIME TO LEAVE MY MOTHER'S OFFICE AND RETURN TO OUR JOBS. I HOPE THIS HAS BEEN ILLUMINATING TO YOU.
Zh: “是的。我们的会晤结束了。是时候离开我母亲的办公室，回到工作中去了。我希望这对你有所启发。”

En: AND REMEMBER. WHAT HAPPENS IN MY MOM'S OFFICE, STAYS IN MY MOM'S OFFICE. QUIET CONTEMPLATION ENDS, BIOLOGICAL RIVALRY RESUMES.
Zh: “还有*记住*，在我母亲的办公室里发生的事情，不能传出我母亲的办公室。安静的沉思结束了，生物学的对抗将会继续。”

En: I HAVE RETURNED WITH THE HAM SANDWICH. LOOK, HE IS ALIVE. I HAVE NOT HARMED THIS LITTLE COP.
Zh: “我和火腿三明治回来了。你瞧，他还活着。我没有伤害这个条子。”

En: Lieutenant Kitsuragi gives you a small nod when he sees you step outside. Looks like he's been waiting for you.
Zh: 看到你走出房门，曷城警督向你点点头。看来他正在等你。

En: YOU NEED TO BE MORE FORCEFUL. TALK TO HER AGAIN -- ABOUT THE ONLY THING THAT STILL MATTERS TO THIS EMPTY VESSEL -- PALE.
Zh: “你得更努力一点。再和她聊一次——聊聊那个空壳唯一还在乎的东西——灰域。”

En: GO TALK WITH HER AGAIN. ASK HER ABOUT PALE. SEE WHAT A RELENTLESS OBSESSION WITH THE PAST DOES TO A MAN.
Zh: “再和她聊一次。问她关于灰域的事情。看看对于过去的无情执念会对一个人造成什么后果。”

En: Are you saying one of the *lorry drivers* knows how to turn back time?
Zh: “你是在说其中一个货車驾驶员知道如何逆转时间吗？”

En: Paledriver? Yes, we already discussed pale and its many effects.
Zh: “灰域驾驶员？是的，我们已经讨论过灰域和它的诸多影响了。”

En: THIS ONE IS NOT LIKE THE OTHERS. GO FIND HER. SEE WHAT A RELENTLESS OBSESSION WITH THE PAST DOES TO A MAN.
Zh: “她与别人不同。去找她。看看对于过去的无情执念会对一个人造成什么后果。”

En: A PIECE OF ADVICE... The big man leans forward. "STOP FIGHTING TIME AND FACE THE *REAL* ANTAGONIST. FACE *YOURSELF*, PUPA. IT'S A SHOWDOWN EVERY MAN MUST GO THROUGH."
Zh: “一点建议……”巨人身体前倾。“别再和时间战斗了，面对你*真正*的宿敌。面对*你自己*，蚕蛹。这是每个男人都必须经历的最终决战。”

En: WE ARE DONE HERE. AND *REMEMBER*, WHAT HAPPENS IN MY MOTHER'S OFFICE, STAYS IN MY MOTHER'S OFFICE. QUIET CONTEMPLATION ENDS, BIOLOGICAL RIVALRY RESUMES.
Zh: “我们说完了。还有*记住*，在我母亲的办公室里发生的事情，不能传出我母亲的办公室。安静的沉思结束了，生物学的对抗将会继续。”

En: AND YET YOU'RE STILL OBSESSED WITH TURNING BACK TIME? AFTER YOU'VE SEEN WHAT IT DOES TO A MAN?
Zh: “而你依然执着于逆转时间？在你已经看到它对一个人造成的后果之后？”

En: This again? But you've learned the basics... Guess we need to return to Mr. Monolith once we've figured out what else is missing from the curriculum.
Zh: 又来？但你已经学习了理论基础……看来在我们搞清楚到底缺了什么概念之后，还是得回来和石柱先生聊聊。

En: Can't you just give me a straight answer for once?
Zh: “你就不能直截了当地回答一次我的问题吗？”

En: IT'S SIMPLE. I AM JUST NOT INTERESTED IN YOUR IMPOTENT OBSESSION WITH THE PAST.
Zh: “简单。你对过去的孱弱执念令我毫无兴趣。”

En: (Nod thoughtfully.) "Soft and hard -- I see..."
Zh: （若有所思点点头。）“柔情和强硬——我明白了……”

En: No, not a pussy!!
Zh: 不，不是娘炮！

En: Ah yes, 'protein mass' -- a scientific term from Graad, for a person terminally overexposed to the pale. Mouth open, catatonic, completely unable to return to the present.
Zh: 啊是的，‘蛋白块’——一个格拉德的舶来科学术语，用于形容一个在灰域中过度暴露的人。张着嘴，精神紧张，完全无法回到现实。

En: Seems like it isn't working, bröther... maybe you should try talking to other traditionalists instead.
Zh: 看起来这也没用，兄弟……也许你应该试着和其他传统主义者聊聊。
